today_news.title: Jeff Bezos' AI startup Prometheus closes $12 billion round at a $41 billion valuation
today_news.summary: Jeff Bezos' AI startup Prometheus has closed a $12 billion funding round at a $41 billion valuation. The company launched just last November with $6.2 billion in seed funding. No products yet, because Bezos says sharing details would be "premature."

today_news.title: OpenAI vs. Anthropic: A price war over API tokens is brewing
today_news.summary: OpenAI is weighing token price cuts to win customers from Anthropic, the Wall Street Journal reports.

today_news.title: Why “reprogramming” is the buzziest approach to reversing aging right now

today_news.title: Google DeepMind is worried about what happens when millions of agents start to interact
today_news.summary: Google DeepMind is funding research into the potential dangers of situations where millions of different AI agents interact with each other online. today_news.title: Landmark German ruling declares Google's AI Overviews are Google's own words and makes it liable for false answers
today_news.summary: A German regional court has ruled that Google is directly liable for the content of its AI search overviews. According to the court, previous limited liability protections for search engine operators don't apply to AI overviews. In this case, Google's AI had falsely linked two publishers to fraud an...

today_tech.summary: Abstract: Training neural networks (NNs) for speech enhancement (SE) in distant speech-capturing scenarios requires paired distorted and clean reference speech signals. today_tech.title: High-Fidelity Two-Step Image Generation via Teacher-Aligned End-to-End Distillation
today_tech.summary: Abstract: Few-step diffusion distillation has become increasingly mature for 4-8-step generation, yet pushing further to 2 steps remains challenging.
